name: parallel-agent
description: Headless core for the Parallel Agent decision engine.

scripts.dev: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/harness/run-sample-session.ts
scripts.web:dev: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 next dev
scripts.dev:gemma: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/harness/run-sample-session.ts
scripts.dev:gemma:auto: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 PARALLEL_AGENT_AUTOPILOT=1 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/harness/run-sample-session.ts
scripts.web:gemma: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 next dev
scripts.eval:core: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-core-evaluation.ts
scripts.eval:smoke: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 PARALLEL_AGENT_EVAL_MODE=smoke node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-core-evaluation.ts
scripts.eval:gemma: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-core-evaluation.ts
scripts.eval:gemma:smoke: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 PARALLEL_AGENT_EVAL_MODE=smoke node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-core-evaluation.ts
scripts.gemma:smoke: PARALLEL_AGENT_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4:latest OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-gemma-smoke.ts

author: VirtuOasis
